description: Fidel provides card-linking infrastructure that lets businesses connect payment cards to loyalty or rewards applications and receive transaction events. Its product monitors linked-card transactions and delivers updates such as card and transaction events to customer systems.
summary: Fidel exposes one documented REST API for its Select Transactions product at `https://api.fidel.uk/v1`, authenticated with a Fidel secret API key for general API access and, for card creation specifically, an SDK public key; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI were found.
